phrases.english: Good morning, how are you today?
phrases.context: Used to greet someone in the morning.
A very common and respectful greeting used at any time.

phrases.english: Good evening, I hope you are well.
phrases.arabic: مساء الخير، أتمنى أن تكون بخير.
phrases.pronunciation: Masa' al-khair, atamanna an takun bikhair.
phrases.context: Used to greet someone in the evening.

phrases.english: Goodbye, may you be in God's protection.
phrases.context: A common and warm way to say goodbye.

phrases.english: Thank you very much for your help.
phrases.context: Expressing gratitude after someone has assisted you.
